pageContext.name: Son Goku
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce their newest release, Son Goku, from the newest anime show Dragon Ball Super Hero!  This figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Son Goku from the new respective anime. Standing at approximately 9.8' tall, Son Goku is seen in his popular pose.  Be sure to collect this Kakarot figure and enhance your display with other incredible Ichibansho and Dragon Ball figures!
